title: Climbing Stairs
hint: Ways to reach current stair depend on previous two stairs.
intuition: Every step comes from either one-step or two-step jump.

title: Min Cost Climbing Stairs
hint: Current minimum cost depends on previous two states.
intuition: Optimal path is built from optimal smaller paths.
commonMistakes: Paying cost for top floor incorrectly

title: House Robber
hint: At each house choose between robbing or skipping.
intuition: Current choice affects adjacent availability.

title: House Robber II
hint: Solve twice: excluding first house and excluding last house.
intuition: Circular adjacency breaks normal linear DP.
commonMistakes: Including both first and last houses

title: Delete and Earn
hint: Transform numbers into indexed values like houses.
intuition: Adjacent values behave like adjacent houses.

title: Maximum Subarray
hint: Extend current subarray only if it improves the sum.
intuition: Negative prefixes hurt future subarrays.

title: Maximum Product Subarray
hint: Track both maximum and minimum products.
intuition: Negative numbers can flip smallest into largest.

title: Decode Ways
hint: Current position depends on valid one-digit and two-digit decodings.
intuition: Every valid prefix contributes to future combinations.

title: Coin Change
hint: Try taking each coin and minimize remaining amount.
intuition: Optimal amount depends on smaller optimal subamounts.

title: Perfect Squares
hint: Treat perfect squares like unlimited coins.
intuition: Current answer depends on previously solved smaller targets.

title: Partition Equal Subset Sum
hint: Check whether half of total sum can be formed.
intuition: Equal partition reduces to subset sum existence.

title: Target Sum
hint: Convert sign assignment problem into subset sum counting.
intuition: Positive-negative partition determines final target.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
hint: For every index, extend previous increasing subsequences.
intuition: Optimal subsequences grow from smaller valid subsequences.

title: Longest Continuous Increasing Subsequence
hint: Extend sequence only if current number is larger.
intuition: Continuous sequences reset immediately after a break.

title: Longest Arithmetic Subsequence
hint: Track best subsequence length for each difference.
intuition: Common differences define arithmetic subsequences.

title: Word Break
hint: Check whether any previous valid prefix can extend.
intuition: A valid split depends on previously valid partitions.

title: Combination Sum IV
hint: Build ways for every target amount from smaller amounts.
intuition: Every number contributes to future combinations.

title: Integer Break
hint: Try breaking number into every possible pair.
intuition: Optimal partitions grow from smaller optimal partitions.

title: Palindrome Partitioning II
hint: Precompute palindrome ranges first.
intuition: Optimal cuts depend on smaller palindrome partitions.

title: Jump Game VI
hint: Maintain best DP values inside current jump range.
intuition: Only maximum previous state matters for transition.

title: Solving Questions With Brainpower
hint: Choose between solving current question or skipping it.
intuition: Current action determines future reachable states.

title: Number of Longest Increasing Subsequence
hint: Track both LIS length and number of ways.
intuition: Different subsequences can produce same optimal length.

title: Best Sightseeing Pair
hint: Maintain best previous value[i] + i.
intuition: Future scores depend only on strongest previous candidate.

title: Count Ways To Build Good Strings
hint: Build larger lengths from smaller reachable lengths.
intuition: Each valid construction expands future possibilities.

title: Unique Paths
hint: Ways to reach a cell come from top and left.
intuition: Every path builds from smaller reachable positions.

title: Unique Paths II
hint: Blocked cells contribute zero paths.
intuition: Obstacles break normal path propagation.

title: Minimum Path Sum
hint: Current minimum comes from top or left minimum.
intuition: Optimal path cost builds from smaller optimal costs.

title: Triangle
hint: Start from bottom row and move upward.
intuition: Each cell chooses best child path beneath it.

title: Dungeon Game
hint: Work backward from destination cell.
intuition: Future survival requirements determine current minimum health.

title: Maximal Square
hint: Square size depends on top, left, and diagonal cells.
intuition: A square expands only if all neighboring squares exist.

title: Maximal Rectangle
hint: Treat each row as histogram heights.
intuition: Rectangle areas can be computed row-by-row incrementally.

title: Cherry Pickup II
hint: State = row + both robot column positions.
intuition: Two moving agents create combined state transitions.

title: Out of Boundary Paths
hint: Memoize row, column, and remaining moves.
intuition: Repeated movement states overlap heavily.

title: Minimum Falling Path Sum
hint: Each cell can come from three upper directions.
intuition: Optimal downward path depends on best upper predecessor.

title: Longest Increasing Path in a Matrix
hint: Memoize longest path starting from each cell.
intuition: Increasing constraints create DAG-like dependencies.

title: Count Square Submatrices with All Ones
hint: DP value equals largest square ending at current cell.
intuition: Every larger square contains smaller valid squares.
commonMistakes: Using max instead of min neighbor

title: 0/1 Knapsack
hint: For every item choose take or skip.
intuition: Optimal capacity value depends on smaller capacities.

title: Coin Change II
hint: Process coins one by one to avoid duplicate orders.
intuition: Each coin expands future reachable combinations.

title: Last Stone Weight II
hint: Split stones into two groups with minimum difference.
intuition: Stone smashing reduces to balanced partitioning.

title: Ones and Zeroes
hint: State depends on remaining zeros and ones capacity.
intuition: Each string consumes two independent resources.

title: Profitable Schemes
hint: State tracks members used and achieved profit.
intuition: Each crime introduces new resource-profit transitions.

title: Find Target Sum Ways
hint: Convert sign assignment into subset sum counting.
intuition: Positive-negative separation determines target formation.

title: Rod Cutting
hint: Each cut size can be reused multiple times.
intuition: Best rod value comes from optimal smaller cuts.

title: Partition to K Equal Sum Subsets
hint: Track used elements and current subset sum.
intuition: Subset completion naturally transitions into next bucket.

title: Tallest Billboard
hint: State represents difference between two supports.
intuition: Balancing heights matters more than exact subsets.

title: Reducing Dishes
hint: Decide whether including current dish improves total score.
intuition: Earlier chosen dishes affect all future multipliers.

title: Russian Doll Envelopes
hint: Sort width ascending and height descending before LIS.
intuition: Proper sorting converts nesting into 1D LIS.

title: Longest String Chain
hint: Sort words by length and try removing one character.
intuition: Smaller valid words build larger valid chains.

title: Maximum Length of Pair Chain
hint: Extend chains only when current pair can follow previous.
intuition: Pair ordering forms increasing subsequence relationships.

title: Largest Divisible Subset
hint: Sort numbers and extend divisible chains.
intuition: Divisibility behaves similarly to increasing ordering.

title: Best Team With No Conflicts
hint: Sort by age and build best valid score sequence.
intuition: Conflict constraints create LIS-like ordering.

title: Number of Longest Increasing Subsequence
hint: Track both LIS length and count.
intuition: Multiple subsequences may share optimal length.

title: Increasing Triplet Subsequence
hint: Maintain smallest and second smallest values.
intuition: A third larger value confirms increasing triplet existence.

title: Minimum Number of Removals to Make Mountain Array
hint: Compute LIS from left and right for every index.
intuition: Mountain arrays require increasing then decreasing subsequences.

title: Longest Common Subsequence
hint: If characters match, extend diagonally.
intuition: Matching characters contribute to common subsequences.

title: Edit Distance
hint: Try insert, delete, and replace operations.
intuition: Optimal transformations depend on smaller prefixes.

title: Distinct Subsequences
hint: When characters match, choose take or skip.
intuition: Every matching character creates branching possibilities.

title: Longest Palindromic Subsequence
hint: Expand inward using left and right pointers.
intuition: Matching outer characters extend palindrome length.

title: Palindromic Substrings
hint: A substring is palindrome if inner substring is palindrome.
intuition: Larger palindromes build from smaller valid centers.

title: Regular Expression Matching
hint: Handle '.' and '*' separately in transitions.
intuition: Wildcard operators create branching match possibilities.

title: Wildcard Matching
hint: '*' can represent empty or multiple characters.
intuition: Wildcard expansion creates multiple valid transitions.

title: Shortest Common Supersequence
hint: Build result using LCS transitions.
intuition: Common subsequences avoid duplicate insertions.

title: Interleaving String
hint: State depends on positions in both source strings.
intuition: Each character must come from one valid source progression.

title: Minimum ASCII Delete Sum for Two Strings
hint: Delete mismatched characters with minimum total cost.
intuition: Optimal alignment minimizes deletion penalties.
commonMistakes: Using character count instead of ASCII values

title: Count Different Palindromic Subsequences
hint: Handle duplicate boundary characters carefully.
intuition: Duplicate palindrome generation must be avoided systematically.

title: Strange Printer
hint: Merge print operations when characters match.
intuition: Matching characters can share printing turns.

title: Burst Balloons
hint: Think about which balloon bursts last inside an interval.
intuition: Last operation fixes neighboring balloon relationships.

title: Matrix Chain Multiplication
hint: Try every partition point between matrices.
intuition: Optimal multiplication order minimizes repeated computation cost.

title: Minimum Cost Tree From Leaf Values
hint: Partition interval at every possible split point.
intuition: Optimal subtree cost depends on optimal subinterval costs.

title: Palindrome Partitioning III
hint: Precompute palindrome conversion costs for substrings.
intuition: Optimal partitions depend on smaller interval partitions.

title: Guess Number Higher or Lower II
hint: Choose pivot minimizing worst future cost.
intuition: Every wrong guess splits the search interval.
commonMistakes: Optimizing average instead of worst case

title: Stone Game
hint: Players choose leftmost or rightmost pile optimally.
intuition: Optimal decisions depend on opponent’s future responses.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
hint: Track minimum buying price while scanning.
intuition: Maximum profit depends on cheapest previous buy price.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II
hint: Take every profitable upward movement.
intuition: Unlimited transactions allow capturing all positive gains.
commonMistakes: Trying to find global peaks only

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Cooldown
hint: Track buy, sell, and cooldown states separately.
intuition: Selling temporarily restricts future buying actions.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Transaction Fee
hint: Subtract fee during sell transition.
intuition: Transaction costs affect optimal selling decisions.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock III
hint: Track states after each buy and sell.
intuition: Every transaction stage becomes a separate DP state.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock IV
hint: Generalize buy/sell states for k transactions.
intuition: Each transaction introduces another decision layer.

title: Maximum Profit in Job Scheduling
hint: Binary search next compatible job.
intuition: Optimal profit depends on future non-overlapping choices.

title: Delete and Earn
hint: Transform values into indexed earnings array.
intuition: Adjacent values create rob-like restrictions.

title: House Robber III
hint: Return both rob and skip values from each node.
intuition: Choosing a node restricts choosing its children.

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
hint: Each node contributes maximum one-side gain upward.
intuition: Best path may pass through current root node.

title: Unique Binary Search Trees
hint: Choose each node as root and multiply subtree combinations.
intuition: Left and right subtree combinations are independent.
commonMistakes: Adding instead of multiplying subtree counts

title: All Possible Full Binary Trees
hint: Split remaining nodes between left and right subtrees.
intuition: Full binary trees require odd node distributions.

title: Count Nodes With the Highest Score
hint: Compute subtree sizes using DFS.
intuition: Removing a node splits tree into independent components.

title: Sum of Distances in Tree
hint: Use one DFS for subtree info and another for rerooting.
intuition: Changing root updates distance contributions systematically.

title: Can I Win
hint: Memoize used-number states with bitmasking.
intuition: Winning depends entirely on remaining available numbers.
commonMistakes: Using array state instead of bitmask

title: Matchsticks to Square
hint: Track used matchsticks and current side length.
intuition: Completed sides reduce future placement complexity.

title: Shortest Path Visiting All Nodes
hint: State = current node + visited nodes mask.
intuition: Different visited sets create unique traversal states.

title: Partition to K Equal Sum Subsets
hint: Memoize subset states instead of recalculating partitions.
intuition: Used-number combinations define future possibilities.

title: Beautiful Arrangement
hint: Track used numbers with bitmask.
intuition: Position constraints determine valid future choices.

title: Maximum Students Taking Exam
hint: Represent each row seating arrangement as bitmask states.
intuition: Valid row configurations transition independently.

title: Number of Ways to Wear Different Hats to Each Other
hint: Assign hats one-by-one while tracking assigned people.
intuition: Bitmask efficiently represents assignment completion.

title: Minimum XOR Sum of Two Arrays
hint: Bitmask tracks which nums2 elements are already used.
intuition: Each assignment choice affects all future matching costs.

title: Frog Jump
hint: State depends on current stone and previous jump length.
intuition: Future reachable jumps depend on previous movement size.

title: Freedom Trail
hint: State = ring position + key index.
intuition: Every rotation changes future movement costs.

title: Race Car
hint: Overshoot and reverse can sometimes be optimal.
intuition: Position-speed states define future movement possibilities.

title: Split Array Largest Sum
hint: Partition array into k groups optimally.
intuition: Best partition minimizes worst subarray sum.

title: Remove Boxes
hint: Carry count of same-colored boxes while shrinking interval.
intuition: Delayed removals can increase future rewards.

title: Number of Digit One
hint: Process digits position-by-position.
intuition: Digit restrictions create overlapping prefix states.

title: Numbers At Most N Given Digit Set
hint: Track whether current prefix already became smaller than limit.
intuition: Prefix tightness determines future digit choices.

title: Count Vowels Permutation
hint: Each vowel can transition only into specific vowels.
intuition: Character rules form a directed transition graph.

title: Paint House III
hint: State tracks house index, previous color, and neighborhoods formed.
intuition: Color transitions directly affect neighborhood counts.

title: Cherry Pickup
hint: Treat both traversals as simultaneous movements.
intuition: Two synchronized paths avoid duplicate cherry counting.
